subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath heard thy mention and thy call, and hath remembered thee in this perspicuous Tablet, bearing witness that thou hast turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع المظلوم ذکرک و ندآئک ذکرک بهذا اللوح المبین و شهد لک بانک اقبلت الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @empty learning; false spirituality, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
